x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Withdrawal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are removed in cash from the account, typically via ATM or teller.

x-enumeration-literals.name: POS Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are debited to pay for goods or services at a merchant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bill Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are debited to pay bills, subscriptions, or online purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are moved from one account to another, either within the same bank or externally.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where a recurring debit is made automatically at predefined intervals for a fixed amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are automatically debited by a third party with prior authorization.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the bank deducts fees such as maintenance, overdraft, or transaction charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where funds are debited as a penalty for non-compliance with account terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where a previous debit is corrected or reversed, returning funds to the account.
